title: Overview of Forbidden Psalm
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0JFuxpSFiLo

Daniel (@dungeondive) reviews Forbidden Psalm, a skirmish miniatures game set in the Mork Borg world. He demonstrates character creation, combat mechanics, and the campaign structure using Pathfinder pawns instead of expensive models, showing how anyone can play these narrative skirmish games without needing terrain, minis, or heavy financial investment. The video highlights five key features: simple rules, complete compatibility with Mork Borg, playable on small 2x2 tables, mini-agnostic design, and low cost to entry.

----

Have you tried playing Forbidden Psalm or other skirmish games without miniatures, and how did you adapt the rules for your table setup?
